feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Power Star movie Gaddi Tintava Song Dislikes: RGV VS PK Fans Clash

link.title: Power Star movie Gaddi Tintava Song Dislikes: RGV VS PK Fans Clash

entry.content:
Director Ram Gopal Varma has once again targeted Pawan Kalyan and his fans. He is going to make a movie titled Power Star. Finally, he released a special first look poster And first Song from the film.
#PowerStarmovieGaddiTintavaSong
#RGVPowerStarmovie
#PowerStarMovieNewStills
#PowerStarfirstlookposter
#PowerStarmoviefirstsongdislikes
#pkfans
#Pawankalyanfans
#Pawankalyan
#RGV
#RamGopalVarma
#janasena
#megastarchiranjeevi
#trivikramsrinivas
#పవర్ స్టార్
విలక్షణ దర్శకుడు ఏం చేసినా కూడా సోషల్ మీడియాలో ఒక సంచలనమే అని మారోసారి నీరూపించాడు. ఆర్జీవి ప్రస్తుతం పవర్ స్టార్ సినిమాతో హాట్ టాపిక్ గా నిలుస్తున్న విషయం తెలిసిందే. పవర్ స్టార్ సినిమాకు సంబంధించిన మొదటి సాంగ్ కి డిజ్ లైక్స్ ఎక్కువగానే వచ్చాయి. దీంతో వర్మ కూడా కౌంటర్ ఇచ్చే ప్రయత్నం చేశాడు.పవర్ స్టార్ సినిమాకు సంబంధించిన మొదటి పాటను యూ ట్యూబ్ లో రిలీజ్ చేసిన వర్మ నిమిషాల్లోనే దాన్నీ వైరల్ అయ్యేలా చేశాడు. గడ్డి తింటావా అనే ఆ పాటపై పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ అభిమానులు తీవ్ర స్థాయిలో అభ్యంతరం వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. డిస్ లైక్స్ కొట్టడమే కాకుండా వర్మకు వార్నింగ్ లు ఇస్తుండడంతో విషయం మరింత హాట్ టాపిక్ గా మారింది.
entry.summary: Director Ram Gopal Varma has once again targeted Pawan Kalyan and his fans. He is going to make a movie titled Power Star. Finally, he released a special first look poster And first Song from the film. #PowerStarmovieGaddiTintavaSong #RGVPowerStarmovie #PowerStarMovieNewStills #PowerStarfirstlookposter #PowerStarmoviefirstsongdislikes #pkfans #Pawankalyanfans #Pawankalyan #RGV #RamGopalVarma #janasena #megastarchiranjeevi #trivikramsrinivas #పవర్ స్టార్ విలక్షణ దర్శకుడు ఏం చేసినా కూడా సోషల్ మీడియాలో ఒక సంచలనమే అని మారోసారి నీరూపించాడు. ఆర్జీవి ప్రస్తుతం పవర్ స్టార్ సినిమాతో హాట్ టాపిక్ గా నిలుస్తున్న విషయం తెలిసిందే. పవర్ స్టార్ సినిమాకు సంబంధించిన మొదటి సాంగ్ కి డిజ్ లైక్స్ ఎక్కువగానే వచ్చాయి. దీంతో వర్మ కూడా కౌంటర్ ఇచ్చే ప్రయత్నం చేశాడు.పవర్ స్టార్ సినిమాకు సంబంధించిన మొదటి పాటను యూ ట్యూబ్ లో రిలీజ్ చేసిన వర్మ నిమిషాల్లోనే దాన్నీ వైరల్ అయ్యేలా చేశాడు. గడ్డి తింటావా అనే ఆ పాటపై పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ అభిమానులు తీవ్ర స్థాయిలో అభ్యంతరం వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. డిస్ లైక్స్ కొట్టడమే కాకుండా వర్మకు వార్నింగ్ లు ఇస్తుండడంతో విషయం మరింత హాట్ టాపిక్ గా మారింది.

entry.title: Selebritas Lebih Mudah Terpapar Narkoba?

link.title: Selebritas Lebih Mudah Terpapar Narkoba?

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Jerat narkoba bisa terjadi pada semua orang tanpa pandang bulu. Namun, saat sejumlah artis terjerat narkoba, membuat labelnya sebagai publik figur lebih disorot.
Apakah risiko pekerjaan hingga tuntutan eksistensi membuat sejumlah selebritas lebih mudah terpapar narkoba?
Artis dan jeratan narkoba menjadi kasus yang terus berulang hingga pertengahan tahun 2020.
Beragam modus dipakai sejumlah selebritas untuk mendapatkan narkoba.
Dari kasus terkini, polisi menyebut artis Catherine Wilson mengaku menyuruh sekuriti di rumahnya untuk membeli sabu.
Memberantas narkoba ibarat tanggung jawab moral. Tak hanya harus dipikul pihak berwajib, tapi juga setiap pribadi orang masing-masing.
Kerja sama semua pihak menjadi kunci agar narkoba tidak lagi merusak generasi bangsa.
Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Jerat narkoba bisa terjadi pada semua orang tanpa pandang bulu. Namun, saat sejumlah artis terjerat narkoba, membuat labelnya sebagai publik figur lebih disorot. Apakah risiko pekerjaan hingga tuntutan eksistensi membuat sejumlah selebritas lebih mudah terpapar narkoba? Artis dan jeratan narkoba menjadi kasus yang terus berulang hingga pertengahan tahun 2020. Beragam modus dipakai sejumlah selebritas untuk mendapatkan narkoba. Dari kasus terkini, polisi menyebut artis Catherine Wilson mengaku menyuruh sekuriti di rumahnya untuk membeli sabu. Memberantas narkoba ibarat tanggung jawab moral. Tak hanya harus dipikul pihak berwajib, tapi juga setiap pribadi orang masing-masing. Kerja sama semua pihak menjadi kunci agar narkoba tidak lagi merusak generasi bangsa. Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.

entry.title: Is something going on between Sachin Pilot and BJP?

link.title: Is something going on between Sachin Pilot and BJP?

entry.content: Tuesday was a day of fast-paced political development in the changing political scenario of Rajasthan. While Sachin Pilot was removed from his posts by Congress, BJP has sensed an opportunity but has also been extremely cautious while exploring the options ahead. Talking to AajTak, Rajasthan BJP President Satish Punia was asked if something is happening between Sachin Pilot and BJP. what Punia replied, watch video to know.
entry.summary: Tuesday was a day of fast-paced political development in the changing political scenario of Rajasthan. While Sachin Pilot was removed from his posts by Congress, BJP has sensed an opportunity but has also been extremely cautious while exploring the options ahead. Talking to AajTak, Rajasthan BJP President Satish Punia was asked if something is happening between Sachin Pilot and BJP. what Punia replied, watch video to know.

entry.title: Marie Curie - Elemente des Lebens - Making Of Zum Film German Deutsch (2020)

link.title: Marie Curie - Elemente des Lebens - Making Of Zum Film German Deutsch (2020)

entry.content: Die willensstarke und brillante Wissenschaftlerin erhielt nicht nur als erste Frau einen Nobelpreis, sie war auch die erste Person, die jemals mit zwei Preisen ausgezeichnet wurde und das auch noch für zwei unterschiedliche Disziplinen: Physik und Chemie. Ihre Forschung zur Radioaktivität sowie die Entdeckung zweier neuer Elemente – Radium und Polonium – ebnete den Weg für zahlreiche Innovationen und neue Entwicklungen.
entry.summary: Die willensstarke und brillante Wissenschaftlerin erhielt nicht nur als erste Frau einen Nobelpreis, sie war auch die erste Person, die jemals mit zwei Preisen ausgezeichnet wurde und das auch noch für zwei unterschiedliche Disziplinen: Physik und Chemie. Ihre Forschung zur Radioaktivität sowie die Entdeckung zweier neuer Elemente – Radium und Polonium – ebnete den Weg für zahlreiche Innovationen und neue Entwicklungen.

entry.title: CRPF Covid casualty in Kashmir At least 12 Covid deaths in CRPF Oneindia News

link.title: CRPF Covid casualty in Kashmir At least 12 Covid deaths in CRPF Oneindia News

entry.content:
A CRPF personnel Brahma Dutt from Rajasthan died of Covid-19 on Monday at the Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences in Soura, Jammu and Kashmir. Before this, according to reports, at least 18 deaths were reported from the pandemic among the five Central Paramilitary Forces.
#Covid #Forces #CRPF
entry.summary: A CRPF personnel Brahma Dutt from Rajasthan died of Covid-19 on Monday at the Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences in Soura, Jammu and Kashmir. Before this, according to reports, at least 18 deaths were reported from the pandemic among the five Central Paramilitary Forces. #Covid #Forces #CRPF

entry.title: Trump’s Team Cheers Him Up By Talking About Beautiful Boaters And Lying About Polls

link.title: Trump’s Team Cheers Him Up By Talking About Beautiful Boaters And Lying About Polls

entry.content: According to new reports, Donald Trump’s aides are having a harder and harder time trying to cheer up the President, so in recent weeks they have resorted to lying to him about poll numbers and reminding him of all of the "beautiful boaters" who support him. These lies seem harmless enough, but the President then brought this alternative reality to our current reality this week during a press conference.
entry.summary: According to new reports, Donald Trump’s aides are having a harder and harder time trying to cheer up the President, so in recent weeks they have resorted to lying to him about poll numbers and reminding him of all of the "beautiful boaters" who support him. These lies seem harmless enough, but the President then brought this alternative reality to our current reality this week during a press conference.

entry.title: Anand Mahindra Road Roast Oneindia Kannada

link.title: Anand Mahindra Road Roast Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಮುಂಬೈನ ಟ್ರಾಫಿಕ್ ಸಮಸ್ಯೆ ಎದುರಿಸಲು ಆನಂದ್ ಮಹೀಂದ್ರಾ ಹೊಸ ಉಪಾಯವನ್ನು ಕೊಟ್ಟಿದ್ದಾರೆ . ಇದು ಅಸಾಧ್ಯವಾದರೂ ನಮ್ಮ ಹೆಮ್ಮೆ ಎಂದು ಆನಂದ್ ಮಹೇಂದ್ರ ಹೇಳಿದ್ದಾರೆ
Anand Mahindra in his latest tweet has found a solution to tackle Mumbai traffic , here is the complete story
entry.summary: ಮುಂಬೈನ ಟ್ರಾಫಿಕ್ ಸಮಸ್ಯೆ ಎದುರಿಸಲು ಆನಂದ್ ಮಹೀಂದ್ರಾ ಹೊಸ ಉಪಾಯವನ್ನು ಕೊಟ್ಟಿದ್ದಾರೆ . ಇದು ಅಸಾಧ್ಯವಾದರೂ ನಮ್ಮ ಹೆಮ್ಮೆ ಎಂದು ಆನಂದ್ ಮಹೇಂದ್ರ ಹೇಳಿದ್ದಾರೆ Anand Mahindra in his latest tweet has found a solution to tackle Mumbai traffic , here is the complete story

entry.title: From one crisis to the next, the endless march of the Venezuelans

link.title: From one crisis to the next, the endless march of the Venezuelans

entry.content: Nicolò Filippo Rosso took long pictures of Venezuelans fleeing poverty and instability on the Colombian side of their country. Migrants whose situation has been turned upside down by the coronavirus crisis.
entry.summary: Nicolò Filippo Rosso took long pictures of Venezuelans fleeing poverty and instability on the Colombian side of their country. Migrants whose situation has been turned upside down by the coronavirus crisis.

entry.title: Coronavirus : à Leicester, textile et bouches cousues

link.title: Coronavirus : à Leicester, textile et bouches cousues

entry.content: Euronews a la preuve que des usines continuent de fonctionner malgré le confinement imposé dans la ville, dans des conditions "proches de la détention" d’après un salarié.View on euronews
entry.summary: Euronews a la preuve que des usines continuent de fonctionner malgré le confinement imposé dans la ville, dans des conditions "proches de la détention" d’après un salarié.View on euronews

entry.title: Première mondiale : un robot français permet de traiter les métastases à travers la peau

link.title: Première mondiale : un robot français permet de traiter les métastases à travers la peau

entry.content:
La radiologie interventionnelle permet de détruire des tumeurs localisées dans le foie sans avoir à ouvrir.
Des images permettent au praticien de planifier l’angle et la profondeur selon laquelle l’aiguille devra être introduite.
L’aiguille est ensuite insérée dans la tumeur pour la détruire par la chaleur ou le froid.
Pour la première fois, un dispositif robotique a permis de traiter une tumeur primitive au foie.
Grâce à un scanner 3D, un bras articulé s’est positionné afin que le radiologue insère l’aiguille à travers le guide.
Sans le robot, les spécialistes doivent avancer pas à pas et des rayons supplémentaires pendant l’opération.
entry.summary: La radiologie interventionnelle permet de détruire des tumeurs localisées dans le foie sans avoir à ouvrir. Des images permettent au praticien de planifier l’angle et la profondeur selon laquelle l’aiguille devra être introduite. L’aiguille est ensuite insérée dans la tumeur pour la détruire par la chaleur ou le froid. Pour la première fois, un dispositif robotique a permis de traiter une tumeur primitive au foie. Grâce à un scanner 3D, un bras articulé s’est positionné afin que le radiologue insère l’aiguille à travers le guide. Sans le robot, les spécialistes doivent avancer pas à pas et des rayons supplémentaires pendant l’opération.

entry.title: Kannad Gothilla :ರಚಿತಾ ರಾಮ್ ಚಾನ್ಸ್ ಮಿಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಂಡ್ರು ಹರಿಪ್ರಿಯಾ ಕ್ಯಾಚ್ ಹಾಕೊಂಡ್ರು Mayuraa Raghavendra

link.title: Kannad Gothilla :ರಚಿತಾ ರಾಮ್ ಚಾನ್ಸ್ ಮಿಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಂಡ್ರು ಹರಿಪ್ರಿಯಾ ಕ್ಯಾಚ್ ಹಾಕೊಂಡ್ರು Mayuraa Raghavendra

entry.content:
ಕನ್ನಡ್ ಗೊತ್ತಿಲ್ಲ ಚಿತ್ರದ ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕ ಮಯೂರ್ ರಾಘವೇಂದ್ರ OTT ವೇದಿಕೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ತಮ್ಮ ಚಿತ್ರ ಉತ್ತಮ ಪ್ರತಿಕ್ರಿಯೆ ಗಳಿಸಿದ್ದಕ್ಕೆ ತಮ್ಮ ಅನಿಸಿಕೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹಂಚಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
Kannad Gottilla fame director Mayur Raghavendra talk about OTT platform.
entry.summary: ಕನ್ನಡ್ ಗೊತ್ತಿಲ್ಲ ಚಿತ್ರದ ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕ ಮಯೂರ್ ರಾಘವೇಂದ್ರ OTT ವೇದಿಕೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ತಮ್ಮ ಚಿತ್ರ ಉತ್ತಮ ಪ್ರತಿಕ್ರಿಯೆ ಗಳಿಸಿದ್ದಕ್ಕೆ ತಮ್ಮ ಅನಿಸಿಕೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹಂಚಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. Kannad Gottilla fame director Mayur Raghavendra talk about OTT platform.

entry.title: Tour de France 2020 - One day One story : Champs Elysées

link.title: Tour de France 2020 - One day One story : Champs Elysées

entry.content: The final finish of the Tour is in itself an achievement for any cyclist, whether he arrives there wearing the Yellow Jersey or whether he is simply enjoying the pride of having completed the world’s greatest race. Since 1975, this objective has been symbolised by the Avenue des Champs-Elysées, which has become one of the most sought-after places on the sprinting planet for the prestigious bouquet at stake at the end of the stage. The time of celebration takes on an even more spectacular aspect during the anniversary editions. This was the case for the centenary of the event in 1903 and for the 100th edition of the Tour in 2013, when a sound and light show was projected on the façade of the triumphal arch.
entry.summary: The final finish of the Tour is in itself an achievement for any cyclist, whether he arrives there wearing the Yellow Jersey or whether he is simply enjoying the pride of having completed the world’s greatest race. Since 1975, this objective has been symbolised by the Avenue des Champs-Elysées, which has become one of the most sought-after places on the sprinting planet for the prestigious bouquet at stake at the end of the stage. The time of celebration takes on an even more spectacular aspect during the anniversary editions. This was the case for the centenary of the event in 1903 and for the 100th edition of the Tour in 2013, when a sound and light show was projected on the façade of the triumphal arch.

entry.title: Mozilla’s VPN launches out of beta on Windows and Android

link.title: Mozilla’s VPN launches out of beta on Windows and Android

entry.content: Mozilla’s VPN service has been officially launched and is now available for Windows and Android in six countries worldwide, including the US, Canada, and the UK, the company announced today. According to The Verge, the service is available for 4.99 USD a month, and, like other VPNs, it is designed to make web-browsing more private and secure. As part of the move, the service is being rebranded from Firefox Private Network to Mozilla VPN, a change that was announced last month. Including the US, Canada, and the UK, Mozilla says its VPN is initially also available in Singapore, Malaysia, and New Zealand, and that it might expand its availability to more countries later this year. About its launch on Android and Windows, Mozilla says that it will be officially coming to iOS soon.
entry.summary: Mozilla’s VPN service has been officially launched and is now available for Windows and Android in six countries worldwide, including the US, Canada, and the UK, the company announced today. According to The Verge, the service is available for 4.99 USD a month, and, like other VPNs, it is designed to make web-browsing more private and secure. As part of the move, the service is being rebranded from Firefox Private Network to Mozilla VPN, a change that was announced last month. Including the US, Canada, and the UK, Mozilla says its VPN is initially also available in Singapore, Malaysia, and New Zealand, and that it might expand its availability to more countries later this year. About its launch on Android and Windows, Mozilla says that it will be officially coming to iOS soon.

entry.title: The new Maserati Nettuno Engine Detailed presentation

link.title: The new Maserati Nettuno Engine Detailed presentation

entry.content: No fewer than five new models celebrated their series launch at BMW Group Plant Dingolfing today. The first new addition is the BMW 4 Series Coupé, which continues the sports coupé tradition at the BMW site in Lower Bavaria with its individual and sporty character. Updated models of the BMW 5 Series Sedan, including the BMW M5 and the BMW 5 Series Touring, will come off the production line at the same time. All vehicles with four and six-cylinder engines will now offer not only sharper design, but also highly efficient 48-volt mild-hybrid technology – ensuring improved driving performance with better fuel economy and enhanced driving comfort. This will also benefit the new BMW 6 Series Gran Turismo, which impresses customers with its outstanding long-distance capabilities.
entry.summary: No fewer than five new models celebrated their series launch at BMW Group Plant Dingolfing today. The first new addition is the BMW 4 Series Coupé, which continues the sports coupé tradition at the BMW site in Lower Bavaria with its individual and sporty character. Updated models of the BMW 5 Series Sedan, including the BMW M5 and the BMW 5 Series Touring, will come off the production line at the same time. All vehicles with four and six-cylinder engines will now offer not only sharper design, but also highly efficient 48-volt mild-hybrid technology – ensuring improved driving performance with better fuel economy and enhanced driving comfort. This will also benefit the new BMW 6 Series Gran Turismo, which impresses customers with its outstanding long-distance capabilities.

entry.title: Pro Chefs Show 6 Methods For Making The Best Scrambled Eggs

link.title: Pro Chefs Show 6 Methods For Making The Best Scrambled Eggs

entry.content: Delish invited celeb chefs Masaharu Morimoto, Millie Peartree, Judy Joo, Adam Richman, Anne Burrell, and Andrew Zimmern to show how they make their favorite scrambled eggs.
entry.summary: Delish invited celeb chefs Masaharu Morimoto, Millie Peartree, Judy Joo, Adam Richman, Anne Burrell, and Andrew Zimmern to show how they make their favorite scrambled eggs.

entry.title: Fans Are Delighted Seeing First Look Of Sidharth Shukla-Neha Sharma’s Music Video

link.title: Fans Are Delighted Seeing First Look Of Sidharth Shukla-Neha Sharma’s Music Video

entry.content: Bigg Boss 13 winner Sidharth Shukla will soon be seen in a new music video opposite actress Neha Sharma. The actors took to Instagram and shared the first poster of their upcoming song, Dil ko karaar aaya. In the poster, Sidharth Shukla and Neha Sharma are dressed in white and sitting on a boat decorated with lights. "Here’s the first look of #DilKoKaraarAaya,” Sidharth captioned the poster, which the fans are clearly liking. “You both are looking so adorable,” a user commented. “Can’t wait to see their chemistry,” another one wrote. Neha Sharma too took to her official Instagram handle to share the poster. The caption read, “Super excited to share the first look of dil ko karaar aaya.”
entry.summary: Bigg Boss 13 winner Sidharth Shukla will soon be seen in a new music video opposite actress Neha Sharma. The actors took to Instagram and shared the first poster of their upcoming song, Dil ko karaar aaya. In the poster, Sidharth Shukla and Neha Sharma are dressed in white and sitting on a boat decorated with lights. "Here’s the first look of #DilKoKaraarAaya,” Sidharth captioned the poster, which the fans are clearly liking. “You both are looking so adorable,” a user commented. “Can’t wait to see their chemistry,” another one wrote. Neha Sharma too took to her official Instagram handle to share the poster. The caption read, “Super excited to share the first look of dil ko karaar aaya.”

entry.title: Champs-Elysées : des terrasses végétalisées « pour faire revenir » les Parisiens

link.title: Champs-Elysées : des terrasses végétalisées « pour faire revenir » les Parisiens

entry.content: Jusqu’au 26 juillet, les Parisiens peuvent profiter d’un cadre apaisant sur la plus belle avenue du monde. Six terrasses végétalisées ont été installées sur les trottoirs pour leur permettre de découvrir les Champs-Elysées autrement et de renouer avec l’avenue vidée de ses touristes.
entry.summary: Jusqu’au 26 juillet, les Parisiens peuvent profiter d’un cadre apaisant sur la plus belle avenue du monde. Six terrasses végétalisées ont été installées sur les trottoirs pour leur permettre de découvrir les Champs-Elysées autrement et de renouer avec l’avenue vidée de ses touristes.

entry.title: IIT में दाखिला लेना होगा और आसान,HRD Minister Ramesh Pokhriyal ने किया ऐलान वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: IIT में दाखिला लेना होगा और आसान,HRD Minister Ramesh Pokhriyal ने किया ऐलान वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
It will be easy to enroll in the IIT of the Indian Institute of Technology this year … Actually the IIT has decided to relax the admission criteria this year. The Class 12 examination was partially canceled by several boards due to the corona virus epidemic, due to which the decision has been taken. The announcement has been made by Union Human Resource and Development Minister Ramesh Pokhriyal Nishank.
भारतीय प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थान यानि की IIT में इस साल दाखिला लेना आसान होगा..दरअसल IIT ने इस साल प्रवेश के मानदंडों में ढील देने का फैसला लिया है। कोरोना वायरस महामारी के कारण कई बोर्ड्स की तरफ से 12वीं कक्षा की परीक्षा को आंशिक रूप से रद्द किया गया था, जिसकी वजह से ये फैसला लिया गया है। इस बात की घोषणा केंद्रीय मानव संसाधन एवं विकास मंत्री रमेश पोखरियाल निशंक ने की है।
#IIT #RameshPpkhriyal
entry.summary: It will be easy to enroll in the IIT of the Indian Institute of Technology this year … Actually the IIT has decided to relax the admission criteria this year. The Class 12 examination was partially canceled by several boards due to the corona virus epidemic, due to which the decision has been taken. The announcement has been made by Union Human Resource and Development Minister Ramesh Pokhriyal Nishank. भारतीय प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थान यानि की IIT में इस साल दाखिला लेना आसान होगा..दरअसल IIT ने इस साल प्रवेश के मानदंडों में ढील देने का फैसला लिया है। कोरोना वायरस महामारी के कारण कई बोर्ड्स की तरफ से 12वीं कक्षा की परीक्षा को आंशिक रूप से रद्द किया गया था, जिसकी वजह से ये फैसला लिया गया है। इस बात की घोषणा केंद्रीय मानव संसाधन एवं विकास मंत्री रमेश पोखरियाल निशंक ने की है। #IIT #RameshPpkhriyal

entry.title: Jalan Episode 5 - Presented by Ariel - 15th July 2020

link.title: Jalan Episode 5 - Presented by Ariel - 15th July 2020

entry.content:
Jalan Is About How Greed Can Take You To Any Extent
Jalan depicts the extent to which a person can go in jealousy and greed.
Misha and Nisha are two sisters; Nisha’s ambition leads her to destroy the life of her own sister.
Minal Khan as Nisha is the youngest daughter of her family. She is extremely spoiled and used to getting whatever she wants.
Areeba Habib as Misha is the elder sister of Nisha. She is loving and mature. She always gives in to Nisha, and let her take away all her prized possessions.
Both the sisters have polar opposite personalities. Misha always compromises while Nisha does not believe in compromising under any circumstances.
Sajida Syed as Sajeela and Mohammed Ahmed as Tanveer are the parents of Misha and Nisha.
Tanveer and Sajeela live happily with their two daughters whom they love a lot.
Emmad Irfani as Asfandyar belongs to a well-off family. He is charming and a complete gentleman. He falls in love with Misha at first sight and both of them get married.
Related: Here’s why people are lauding Mohib Mirza for Dushman-e-Jaan
Fahad Sheikh as Ahmer is the maternal cousin of Nisha and Misha. He is head over heels in love with Nisha.
Nisha might have Ahmer’s love but she is jealous of her sister’s lifestyle after marriage and starts to idealize Asfandyar which slowly becomes an obsession.
Directed By: Aabis Raza
Written By: Sidra Sehar Imran
Cast:
Minal Khan ,
Areeba Habib ,
Emmad Irfani .
Fahad Sheikh
Mohammed Ahmed
Sajida Syed
Nadia Hussain
Maira Khan
Sabiha Hashmi
Hajra Yamin
Every Wednesday at 8:00 PM, only on ARY Digital.
entry.summary: Jalan Is About How Greed Can Take You To Any Extent Jalan depicts the extent to which a person can go in jealousy and greed. Misha and Nisha are two sisters; Nisha’s ambition leads her to destroy the life of her own sister. Minal Khan as Nisha is the youngest daughter of her family. She is extremely spoiled and used to getting whatever she wants. Areeba Habib as Misha is the elder sister of Nisha. She is loving and mature. She always gives in to Nisha, and let her take away all her prized possessions. Both the sisters have polar opposite personalities. Misha always compromises while Nisha does not believe in compromising under any circumstances. Sajida Syed as Sajeela and Mohammed Ahmed as Tanveer are the parents of Misha and Nisha. Tanveer and Sajeela live happily with their two daughters whom they love a lot. Emmad Irfani as Asfandyar belongs to a well-off family. He is charming and a complete gentleman. He falls in love with Misha at first sight and both of them get married. Related: Here’s why people are lauding Mohib Mirza for Dushman-e-Jaan Fahad Sheikh as Ahmer is the maternal cousin of Nisha and Misha. He is head over heels in love with Nisha. Nisha might have Ahmer’s love but she is jealous of her sister’s lifestyle after marriage and starts to idealize Asfandyar which slowly becomes an obsession. Directed By: Aabis Raza Written By: Sidra Sehar Imran Cast: Minal Khan , Areeba Habib , Emmad Irfani . Fahad Sheikh Mohammed Ahmed Sajida Syed Nadia Hussain Maira Khan Sabiha Hashmi Hajra Yamin Every Wednesday at 8:00 PM, only on ARY Digital.

entry.title: Rajasthan Political Crisis: Union Minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat issued notice Oneindia News

link.title: Rajasthan Political Crisis: Union Minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat issued notice Oneindia News

entry.content: India recorded 40,425 new coronavirus cases and 681 deaths in the last 24 hours, in the biggest single-day jump, government data this morning showed. The fresh cases put the total tally in India at 11,18,043. Union minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat has been asked to appear for questioning in an investigation into allegations of a conspiracy to pull down the Rajasthan government. Shekhawat, a senior BJP leader has denied the allegations. The petition by Sachin Pilot and 18 other rebel Congress MLAs against disqualification notices cannot be decided by any court before the Speaker takes action, Abhishek Manu Singhvi argued during a hearing at the Rajasthan High Court today. An angry mob is seen thrashing a Dalit man with sticks and shoes after pinning him to the ground in a video from Karnataka’s Vijayapura district. The man - a Dalit- was allegedly stripped on Saturday and thrashed with his family, police said, adding that the crowd was angry because "he had touched a bike of a man who belonged to the upper caste.
entry.summary: India recorded 40,425 new coronavirus cases and 681 deaths in the last 24 hours, in the biggest single-day jump, government data this morning showed. The fresh cases put the total tally in India at 11,18,043. Union minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat has been asked to appear for questioning in an investigation into allegations of a conspiracy to pull down the Rajasthan government. Shekhawat, a senior BJP leader has denied the allegations. The petition by Sachin Pilot and 18 other rebel Congress MLAs against disqualification notices cannot be decided by any court before the Speaker takes action, Abhishek Manu Singhvi argued during a hearing at the Rajasthan High Court today. An angry mob is seen thrashing a Dalit man with sticks and shoes after pinning him to the ground in a video from Karnataka’s Vijayapura district. The man - a Dalit- was allegedly stripped on Saturday and thrashed with his family, police said, adding that the crowd was angry because "he had touched a bike of a man who belonged to the upper caste.

entry.title: MP में सरपंच को Donkey पर उल्टा बैठाकर क्यों निकाला जुलूस ? हैरान कर देगी ये वजह वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: MP में सरपंच को Donkey पर उल्टा बैठाकर क्यों निकाला जुलूस ? हैरान कर देगी ये वजह वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Villagers are being searched for rains in Malwa, Madhya Pradesh. After decorating a donkey, the villagers took out a procession by keeping the sarpanch upside down. Villagers believe that doing so will bring good rainfall.
मध्य प्रदेश के मालवा मे बारिश के लिए ग्रामीणों द्वारा टोटके किए जा रहे हैं। एक गधे को सजा कर ग्रामीणों ने सरपंच को उल्टा बैठाकर जुलूस निकाला। ग्रामीणों का मानना है कि ऐसा करने से अच्छी बारिश होगी।
#MadhyaPradesh #Donkey #Sarpanch
entry.summary: Villagers are being searched for rains in Malwa, Madhya Pradesh. After decorating a donkey, the villagers took out a procession by keeping the sarpanch upside down. Villagers believe that doing so will bring good rainfall. मध्य प्रदेश के मालवा मे बारिश के लिए ग्रामीणों द्वारा टोटके किए जा रहे हैं। एक गधे को सजा कर ग्रामीणों ने सरपंच को उल्टा बैठाकर जुलूस निकाला। ग्रामीणों का मानना है कि ऐसा करने से अच्छी बारिश होगी। #MadhyaPradesh #Donkey #Sarpanch

entry.title: SONDAGE : Castex fait jeu égal avec Philippe

link.title: SONDAGE : Castex fait jeu égal avec Philippe

entry.content: Jean Castex fait son entrée dans notre baromètre mensuel Ifod-JDD. Le nouveau Premier ministre fait jeu égal avec son prédécesseur. Lors de son arrivée à ­Matignon en Mai 2017, Edouard ­Philippe avait 55% d’opinion favorable. Plus de la moitié des ­Français se disaient alors satisfaits de sa nomination. Castex concentre ­toutefois davantage d’opinions négatives : 40% contre 24% pour Philippe. Ce dernier alors inconnu du grand public, peu de sondés avaient souhaité s’exprimer. Frédéric Dabi, directeur général adjoint de l’Ifop A charge donc pour ­Jean Castex de faire ses preuves… …et de faire oublier ­Philippe. Les mécontents voient en Castex, une "marionnette d’Emmanuel Macron". Jean Castex séduit toutefois l’électorat de droite. 71% chez les sympathisants des Républicains et 66% chez les retraités.
entry.summary: Jean Castex fait son entrée dans notre baromètre mensuel Ifod-JDD. Le nouveau Premier ministre fait jeu égal avec son prédécesseur. Lors de son arrivée à ­Matignon en Mai 2017, Edouard ­Philippe avait 55% d’opinion favorable. Plus de la moitié des ­Français se disaient alors satisfaits de sa nomination. Castex concentre ­toutefois davantage d’opinions négatives : 40% contre 24% pour Philippe. Ce dernier alors inconnu du grand public, peu de sondés avaient souhaité s’exprimer. Frédéric Dabi, directeur général adjoint de l’Ifop A charge donc pour ­Jean Castex de faire ses preuves… …et de faire oublier ­Philippe. Les mécontents voient en Castex, une "marionnette d’Emmanuel Macron". Jean Castex séduit toutefois l’électorat de droite. 71% chez les sympathisants des Républicains et 66% chez les retraités.
